name: notification-bell
description: In-app notification center: bell icon with unread count, dropdown list, mark-as-read, dismiss-all. Server-side notifyUser() helper emits over Socket.IO for live badges.
postInstall: 3. Server-side, call notifyUser(userId, {type, ...}) to push a notification — it writes the DB row and emits 'notification' on the user's socket room
4. Optional: integrate with web-push-vapid so notifications also reach offline users
